title: Wall of Shame — where protein fitness predictors collectively fail
description: Joins the ProteinGym benchmark summary (217 deep mutational scanning assays scored by ~80 models) with per-assay metadata to find proteins every state-of-the-art model fails on. Stability assays are easiest (median best-model Spearman 0.72), activity is the frontier. Interactive py3Dmol viewer fetches AlphaFold structures by UniProt ID, colored by pLDDT — the hardest proteins overlap with regions AlphaFold itself isn't confident in.
